name: YUM BRANDS INC
summary: Yum! Brands, Inc. is a global quick-service restaurant company operating three major franchise brands: KFC, Pizza Hut, and Taco Bell. The company franchises and operates restaurants worldwide across numerous countries, offering fried chicken, pizza, and Mexican-inspired food products. It also operates The Habit Restaurants and Saucy Restaurants concepts, with subsidiaries spanning technology, advertising, franchising, real estate, and international holdings across more than 20 countries.
